_documentation: Papers that won the European Security Studies Prize (EISS x Journal of Strategic Studies; awarded for the best paper by an early-career researcher). Keyed <year>::<normalised-title>, the same key scheme as paperAbstracts*.json (NFKD, strip diacritics, lowercase, non-alphanumerics to single spaces). Looked up in corpus.js (so the Anthology paper page + by-paper list show a badge, and a winner always earns a landing page) and in archiveProgrammesEnriched.js (so the edition programme grid shows it on the contribution). The winning year is the key's year prefix and the paper's conference year. Add a new winner by adding its key here; no code change needed.
